description.unified: Deals of ATK M.DMG per hit, attacking 7 times, to nearby enemies in a circular area around the user. Then deals of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and knocks them down for [1.5 sec->1.8 sec].

Deals of ATK M.DMG to all enemies and stuns them for [0.5 sec->1.2 sec]. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10 sec, increasing the ATK Spd of all allies by [15%->300]. While active, releases a shockwave every [1.3 sec->1.4 sec], dealing of ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies and stunning them for [(added) 0.6 sec].

Summons an Arcane Crystal to deal of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area, then causes an explosion shortly afterward that deals of ATK additional M.DMG. Inflicts [Arcane Crystal Curse] on enemies for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by [10%->200]. When attacking enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies 1 stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes after 5 sec, dealing of ATK M.DMG plus an additional 43% of ATK per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy].
Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by [150->200], and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by [20%->30%].

II.unified: Increases ATK Boost by [Crit Chance by 50 -> 10%].

III.unified: Increases ATK Boost by [Crit Chance by 75 -> 15%].

IV.unified: Increases ATK Boost by [Crit Chance by 125 -> 25%].

dark.unified: If there is only 1 enemy, DMG is increased by [15% stackable up to 10 -> 100%].

light.unified: Increases Mana Cost by [(added) 1000] and reduces Cooldown by [(added) 6 sec] [(removed) Arcane Crystal Awakening Increases duration by 4 sec].

dark.unified: While under [Arcane Crystal Awakening], damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [(added) 20%] [(removed) Kirze’s ATK Spd by 40%].

light.unified: Increases Mana Cost by [(added) 1000] and reduces Cooldown by [(added) 6 sec] [(removed) Arcane Crystal Curse additionally reduces ATK Spd by 10%].
At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [65%->25%] for [10 sec->20 sec].

description.unified: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [100->250] for the duration of Skill.
Increases DMG of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!] by [ {0}% -> 40%], and upon gaining a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], there is a [(added) {0}%] chance to gain [1 additional stack -> 3 additional stacks].
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by an additional 250 and the duration of CC increase effect by an additional {0}%.

dark.unified: Increases Crit DMG by [30%->40%] and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.
